personal.name: Vaishnavi B
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Full Stack & Machine Learning Engineer building responsive applications and intelligent systems.
personal.bio: Proactive engineer with a strong foundation in machine learning and full-stack development. Skilled in Python and modern web technologies, focused on building responsive applications and advanced ML models with engaging user experiences.
personal.currentRoleDescription: Focused on full-stack development and machine learning solutions, building scalable applications and intelligent systems using modern web and AI technologies.

about.title: About
sections: I'm a Software Engineer specializing in full-stack development and machine learning, with a strong focus on building scalable and user-centric applications.
I have hands-on experience in developing end-to-end solutions, from frontend interfaces to backend services, along with implementing machine learning models for real-world applications.
I enjoy working on innovative projects involving deep learning, computer vision, and data-driven solutions while continuously expanding my technical expertise.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Development Intern
experience.description: Developed responsive web applications including an e-commerce platform. Integrated frontend with Node.js and Express.js backend services to build a complete full-stack product.

projects.title: 3D Protein Prediction
projects.description: Deep learning model for predicting protein structures.
projects.longDescription: Implemented a deep learning model to predict 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences using CNNs, RNNs, and Transformers. Inspired by AlphaFold architecture and trained on biological datasets like PDB.

projects.title: Email Spam Detection
projects.longDescription: Built a text classification model using TF-IDF vectorization and Naïve Bayes classifier, achieving around 90% accuracy with a complete preprocessing pipeline.

projects.title: Full Stack To-Do App
projects.description: Task management app with CRUD operations.
projects.longDescription: Developed a responsive task management application with drag-and-drop features using React.js frontend, Node.js/Express backend, and MongoDB for persistence.

projects.title: Pothole Detection AI
projects.description: Computer vision model for road safety.
projects.longDescription: Built a CNN-based model to detect potholes from images and videos using OpenCV and TensorFlow, achieving 80–90% accuracy.
